EC50: the concentration whereupon perceived activity reaches 50% of the maximum
EC50 Standard Error: the standard error for the calculated EC50 value
S0: the fitted activity level at zero concentration
SInf: the fitted activity level at infinite concentration
Num. Points: the number of data points included in the plot
Activity at 0.10uM: The average measured activity of all accepted replicates at the specified concentration
